c4_invariant: Wall-tree nested frames: majority color = room bg; full-height/width uniform non-bg separator = wall tree; rooms = 4-connected non-wall components (may be C-shaped); depth = Chebyshev distance from 8-neighbor boundary; non-bg seeds at depth d set period[d] (missing depth-0 injects bg); contiguous period from 0 cycles for deeper rings; walls preserved; every room cell = period[depth % len]; train-replay gated.
grammar_update: Corrected C4: wall-tree nested frames; Franklin preview-crop REINJECT rejected.
research_note: Rejection: Franklin used expected_preview (8x12) / shape confusion vs 30x30 input. True C4 paints rooms by Chebyshev depth-period seeds on the wall tree. train 3/3, labeled eval 2/2.
